LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT TWELVE, INC., THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT IS SIGNED. JUDGE; HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. (302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-02-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT AND DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Twelve, Inc.
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Peter Englander's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Twelve, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment is signed. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
